text: Mere pati ke guzarne ke baad property ko lekar dono beto mein bol-chaal band ho gayi hai, aur ab bade bete ne announce kiya ki uske saas-sasur permanently hamare sath rahenge. Main is umar mein akeli aur bechara mehsus kar rahi hoon par unhe mana nahi kar sakti kyunki parivar ki 'izzat' ka sawal hai aur bado ke faisle par sawal uthana hamare sanskar nahi. Main bas mann maar kar unke liye jagah khali kar rahi hoon taaki rishtedar hamari burayi na karein.

Inheritance dispute ne parivar ko do hisso mein baant diya hai aur ab bahu ke maa-baap ne permanently yahan rehne ka faisla sunaya hai. Main dependent hoon isliye gussa hone ke bawajood chup hoon kyunki main nahi chahti ki log kahein ki saas ne aate hi kalesh shuru kar diya. Bete ki khushi aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main apni har takleef daba rahi hoon taaki parivar mein aur darar na aaye.

Dadi ke marne ke baad jaydad ka jhagda itna badha ki bhai-bhai ek dusre ke dushman ban gaye, aur ab in-laws ke permanent aane se mera bacha-kucha samman bhi khatam ho raha hai. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivar ki unity ke liye main chup-chap sab seh rahi hoon kyunki hamare yahan buzurgon ko hamesha jhukna sikhaya jata hai taaki 'izzat' bazaar mein na uchle. Main bas sabki khatir-daari mein lagi hoon taaki rishto ka lihaz bana rahe.

Jaydad ke kalesh mein pehle hi ghar mitti mein mil gaya hai aur ab Mummy keh rahi hain ki in-laws ke aane se hi hamara paksh mazboot hoga. Main is generational gap mein bilkul ignored mehsus karti hoon par bete ke samman ke liye unhe jane ko nahi bol sakti. Main bas mann hi mann ghut rahi hoon par bahar se sabki seva kar rahi hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' wala darr parivar ko aur na tode.

Property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere liye ek naya bojh hai, par parivar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye main hamesha haan mein haan milati hoon. Main physically bimar hoon par unke samman mein apni har takleef kurban kar rahi hoon kyunki rishtedaron mein hamara naam kharab nahi hona chahiye. Main hamesha defensive rehti hoon taaki ghar ki baat bahar na jaye aur rishto ki maryada bani rahe.
